prompt: Create a highly detailed miniature museum diorama inside a polished dark wooden and glass display case, photographed like a realistic macro product shot with shallow depth of field. The scene shows a romantic Venice café at sunset: a young elegant woman named ゆりか sits centered at a small outdoor table, her face intentionally smooth and featureless/blurred, with long flowing chestnut brown hair and a sleeveless mauve knit top with a ruffled high collar plus matching long arm warmers. She rests one hand near her hair, posed calmly. Behind her is a miniature Venetian canal-city backdrop with the Rialto Bridge, warm orange and cream buildings, arched windows, balconies, glowing street lamps, and a sky tinted peach and dusk blue. The café foreground contains exactly 5 main prop groups: 1 wooden table with a red tablecloth, 2 wooden chairs, 1 white coffee cup and saucer with visible steam, 2 green lampposts with warm yellow lanterns, and 1 dense flower bed of red and yellow roses running across the balcony rail. The diorama is framed by open glass panels and thick varnished wood borders, sitting on a clear acrylic base, with softly blurred dark surroundings outside the case. On the front of the wooden case, attach an ornate brass nameplate with engraved Japanese text: large title ゆりか, smaller subtitle ゆりかのベネチアの夕暮れ, and tiny line -博物ジオラマ作品. Use warm cinematic lighting, rich wood grain, realistic miniature scale, glossy glass reflections, cozy lantern glow, and a high-end handcrafted diorama aesthetic. Keep the composition horizontal 16:9, centered on the seated woman and brass plaque, with the background softly but recognizably detailed.
